summary: Employee Compensation & Payout Architecture - All tests passed. Backend APIs (20/20) and Frontend UI verified successfully.
passed_tests: test_get_deduction_types_returns_all_10_types - All 10 deduction types returned with ledger mapping
test_deduction_types_have_ledger_mapping - Each type has ledger_impact, statutory flag, and name
test_statutory_deductions_flagged_correctly - TDS, PF, ESI, PT flagged as statutory
test_employee_classifications_returned - 5 classifications: permanent, probation, trainee, freelancer, channel_partner
test_get_incentive_types - Returns incentive_types and commission_types
test_incentive_types_have_project_linked_flag - Booking, execution, completion, review are project-linked
test_commission_types_have_ledger_mapping - referral, channel_partner, project_linked have ledger mapping
test_salary_processing_with_deductions - Calculates gross, deductions, statutory/non-statutory, net payable
test_salary_processing_invalid_deduction_type - Returns 400 for invalid type
test_salary_processing_negative_net_payable_rejected - Rejects when deductions > gross
test_create_incentive - Creates incentive with pending status
test_approve_incentive - Approves pending incentive
test_payout_incentive - Processes payout with cashbook entry
test_get_incentives - Returns incentives with summary (pending, approved, paid totals)
test_create_commission - Creates commission for referral/channel partner
test_payout_commission - Processes commission payout with cashbook entry
test_get_commissions - Returns commissions with summary
test_get_employee_earnings - Returns unified earnings view
test_employee_earnings_includes_salary_cycles - Includes salary cycles array
test_employee_earnings_includes_incentives - Includes incentives array
UI: Salaries page loads with all 5 tabs (Overview, Monthly Status, All Employees, Incentives, Commissions)
UI: Incentives tab shows Create Incentive button and incentive list with Approve/Pay actions
UI: Commissions tab shows Create Commission button and commission list with Pay action
UI: Monthly Status tab shows Process with Deductions button
UI: Deductions breakdown visible in salary cycles table
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_ prefixed incentives and commissions for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Employee Compensation & Payout Architecture fully implemented and tested. Features verified: 1) 10 deduction types with ledger mapping (leave, late_attendance, loss_recovery, advance_recovery, penalty, tds, pf, esi, professional_tax, custom), 2) 5 employee classifications (permanent, probation, trainee, freelancer, channel_partner), 3) Incentive engine with create/approve/payout flow, 4) Commission management for referrals and channel partners, 5) Unified employee earnings visibility, 6) Salary processing with structured deductions. All backend APIs return proper responses and frontend UI shows new Incentives and Commissions tabs with full CRUD functionality.
